paragraphs.text: A correspondence with Obsidian Fold begins quietly — a sentence, a sketch, the outline of an intention. We answer in kind.
Replies within three working days. Vienna time, CET / CEST.

If you are a cultural institution, an independent luxury label, or an individual with a vision that requires considered visual architecture — we would like to hear from you. Send a brief paragraph describing the work, its audience, and the moment you intend to meet. We will respond with questions before we respond with proposals.
A boutique brand-identity studio crafting visual systems for cultural institutions and independent luxury labels. Founded 2017, Vienna.
